text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm, thank you. ...Heh, I don't think you've
forgotten my birthday even once.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Same goes for you, Big Sis. You're always the first
one to wish me a happy birthday right as the
clock ticks midnight.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that takes me back. Do you still remember
the handmade present you gave me when we were
kids?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I still treasure that gift, even today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Really now? Your face just now says otherwise.
Those origami spectacles were a fine piece of art,
if I do say so myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They were the perfect size to wear, too. Oh, why
don't I go fetch them now? It's been a while, but I
keep them safe in a drawer in my room.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No way they still fit. You're not a kid
anymore—you're way bigger.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wha—whose head are you calling big?!
